allow: PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); do { try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8000/health; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); $b = @{ message = "what color do I want my graphs to be?"; session_id = "fresh-session" } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/chat -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $b; "FRESH: $\($r.reply\)"; $b2 = @{ message = "get June's sales and give me a one-line summary"; session_id = "fresh-session-2" } | ConvertTo-Json; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/chat -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $b2; "MULTI: $\($r2.reply\)")
